rationale: Educ. Code §48.310 governs FSP allotments for educator preparation programs completing literacy or math academies. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised values, or property tax revenue, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not directly conflict with this provision.
quote: An educator preparation program participating in a Preparing and Retaining Educators through Partnership Preservice Program under Section 21.902, 21.903, 21.904, or 21.905 is entitled to an annual allotment for each teacher candidate who completes a literacy achievement academy or mathematics achievement academy
_note: No direct linkage between this allotment statute and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption. Indirect fiscal pressure on FSP funding is possible but not a statutory conflict.
